arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe 'breaks silence' on Real Madrid red card as Arsenal await suspension update
arts.sum: Judging by that, it is quite clear the general consensus is that it was not a malicious challenge by Mbappe and that belief has been furthered by what Blanco, the man who was fouled, said after the game. Kylian Mbappe has apologised to Alaves midfielder Antonio Blanco after the Real Madrid star's reckless challenge that led to him being sent off.

arts.sum: Newcastle United sources have confirmed to TBR Football that they have clinched the signature of Malaga teenager Antonio Cordero. The teenager is out-of-contract this summer,...

arts.ttl: UEFA consider Champions League rule change after Arsenal paired with Real Madrid
arts.sum: UEFA revamped the Champions League this season and they are already considering making some changes ahead of next season's tournament due to Arsenal's clash with Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Real Madrid and Barcelona lose out on 18-year-old Spanish talent as contract is agreed
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Barcelona are generally competing for the very best talents in Spanish football, and few escape their grasps. That is the case for 18-year-old winger Antonio Cordero though, who is headed for the Premier League. Barcelona had initially taken an interest in Cordero last summer as he began making waves in Malaga’s promotion […] The post Real Madrid and Barcelona lose out on 18-year-old Spanish talent as contract is agreed appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Ballon d'Or to boardroom – why Swansea for Modric?
arts.sum: With Luka Modric investing in Swansea City, BBC Sport asks why? How did it happen? What will his role be? And what does it mean for the Welsh club?

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Bayern Munich open talks for Jonathan David
arts.sum: Arsenal and Bayern Munich have opened talks with the entourage of Jonathan David over a potential summer free transfer. If true, it will cost €34m over the first year alone for Arsenal or Bayern Munich to sign David this summer.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer news: 'Progress made' in effort to sign the 'next Martin Odegaard'
arts.sum: Aston Villa reportedly emerge as the frontrunners to sign Norwegian starlet Sverre Nypan ahead of Premier League and Spanish sides.
